sentences.hanzi: 你好，请问您贵姓？
sentences.pinyin: nǐ hǎo, qǐngwèn nín guìxìng?
sentences.english: Hello, may I ask your surname?

sentences.hanzi: 这是我的名片。
sentences.pinyin: zhè shì wǒ de míngpiàn.
sentences.english: This is my business card.

sentences.hanzi: 我们几点开会？
sentences.pinyin: wǒmen jǐ diǎn kāi huì?
sentences.english: What time is our meeting?

sentences.hanzi: 请把报告发给我。
sentences.pinyin: qǐng bǎ bàogào fā gěi wǒ.
sentences.english: Please send me the report.

sentences.hanzi: 这个项目什么时候完成？
sentences.pinyin: zhège xiàngmù shénme shíhou wánchéng?
sentences.english: When will this project be finished?

sentences.hanzi: 合同已经签好了。
sentences.pinyin: hétóng yǐjīng qiān hǎo le.
sentences.english: The contract has been signed.

sentences.hanzi: 我们公司在北京有办公室。
sentences.pinyin: wǒmen gōngsī zài Běijīng yǒu bàngōngshì.
sentences.english: Our company has an office in Beijing.

sentences.hanzi: 今天的会议推迟到下午三点。
sentences.pinyin: jīntiān de huìyì tuīchí dào xiàwǔ sān diǎn.
sentences.english: Today's meeting has been postponed to 3 p.m.

sentences.hanzi: 请问，您对这个方案有什么意见？
sentences.pinyin: qǐngwèn, nín duì zhège fāng'àn yǒu shénme yìjiàn?
sentences.english: Excuse me, do you have any comments on this proposal?

sentences.hanzi: 这次合作很愉快。
sentences.pinyin: zhè cì hézuò hěn yúkuài.
sentences.english: This collaboration has been very pleasant.

sentences.hanzi: 我需要出差两天。
sentences.pinyin: wǒ xūyào chūchāi liǎng tiān.
sentences.english: I need to go on a business trip for two days.

sentences.hanzi: 你有时间讨论一下吗？
sentences.pinyin: nǐ yǒu shíjiān tǎolùn yīxià ma?
sentences.english: Do you have time for a quick discussion?

sentences.hanzi: 老板说明天放假。
sentences.pinyin: lǎobǎn shuō míngtiān fàngjià.
sentences.english: The boss said tomorrow is a day off.

sentences.hanzi: 我的同事很热情。
sentences.pinyin: wǒ de tóngshì hěn rèqíng.
sentences.english: My colleague is very enthusiastic.

sentences.hanzi: 请在这里签字。
sentences.pinyin: qǐng zài zhèlǐ qiānzì.
sentences.english: Please sign here.

sentences.hanzi: 我们的目标是提高产品质量。
sentences.pinyin: wǒmen de mùbiāo shì tígāo chǎnpǐn zhìliàng.
sentences.english: Our goal is to improve product quality.

sentences.hanzi: 这个价格可以再商量一下。
sentences.pinyin: zhège jiàgé kěyǐ zài shāngliang yīxià.
sentences.english: We can negotiate the price further.

sentences.hanzi: 面试定在下周一。
sentences.pinyin: miànshì dìng zài xià zhōuyī.
sentences.english: The interview is scheduled for next Monday.

sentences.hanzi: 我正在写一份工作计划。
sentences.pinyin: wǒ zhèngzài xiě yī fèn gōngzuò jìhuà.
sentences.english: I'm writing a work plan.

sentences.hanzi: 经理对这个结果很满意。
sentences.pinyin: jīnglǐ duì zhège jiéguǒ hěn mǎnyì.
sentences.english: The manager is very satisfied with this result.

sentences.hanzi: 请准备一下明天的材料。
sentences.pinyin: qǐng zhǔnbèi yīxià míngtiān de cáiliào.
sentences.english: Please prepare the materials for tomorrow.

sentences.hanzi: 我们需要降低成本。
sentences.pinyin: wǒmen xūyào jiàngdī chéngběn.
sentences.english: We need to reduce costs.

sentences.hanzi: 市场竞争越来越激烈。
sentences.pinyin: shìchǎng jìngzhēng yuèláiyuè jīliè.
sentences.english: Market competition is getting more intense.

sentences.hanzi: 这份简历写得不错。
sentences.pinyin: zhè fèn jiǎnlì xiě de búcuò.
sentences.english: This resume is well written.

sentences.hanzi: 你负责哪个部门？
sentences.pinyin: nǐ fùzé nǎge bùmén?
sentences.english: Which department are you in charge of?

sentences.hanzi: 我们的客户来自世界各地。
sentences.pinyin: wǒmen de kèhù láizì shìjiè gèdì.
sentences.english: Our clients come from all over the world.

sentences.hanzi: 请帮我预订一间会议室。
sentences.pinyin: qǐng bāng wǒ yùdìng yī jiān huìyìshì.
sentences.english: Please help me book a conference room.

sentences.hanzi: 这个月的销售额增长了百分之十。
sentences.pinyin: zhège yuè de xiāoshòu'é zēngzhǎng le bǎifēnzhī shí.
sentences.english: This month's sales have grown by ten percent.

sentences.hanzi: 我们应该加强团队合作。
sentences.pinyin: wǒmen yīnggāi jiāqiáng tuánduì hézuò.
sentences.english: We should strengthen teamwork.

sentences.hanzi: 他被提升为副总经理了。
sentences.pinyin: tā bèi tíshēng wéi fù zǒngjīnglǐ le.
sentences.english: He was promoted to vice general manager.

sentences.hanzi: 他在工作。
sentences.pinyin: tā zài gōngzuò.
sentences.english: He is working.

sentences.hanzi: 我要去上班。
sentences.pinyin: wǒ yào qù shàngbān.
sentences.english: I need to go to work.

sentences.hanzi: 该企业在全球范围内建立了完善的供应链管理体系。
sentences.pinyin: gāi qǐyè zài quánqiú fànwéi nèi jiànlì le wánshàn de gōngyìngliàn guǎnlǐ tǐxì.
sentences.english: The enterprise has established a comprehensive supply chain management system on a global scale.

sentences.hanzi: 公司决定对内部管理机制进行全面改革。
sentences.pinyin: gōngsī juédìng duì nèibù guǎnlǐ jīzhì jìnxíng quánmiàn gǎigé.
sentences.english: The company has decided to carry out a comprehensive reform of its internal management mechanisms.

sentences.hanzi: 在资本市场日趋成熟的背景下，企业应当审慎评估融资渠道的多元化策略。
sentences.pinyin: zài zīběn shìchǎng rìqū chéngshú de bèijǐng xià, qǐyè yīngdāng shěnshèn pínggū róngzī qúdào de duōyuánhuà cèlüè.
sentences.english: Against the backdrop of an increasingly mature capital market, enterprises should prudently evaluate diversification strategies for financing channels.

sentences.hanzi: 跨国并购的尽职调查须涵盖法律合规、财务审计及文化整合等多个维度。
sentences.pinyin: kuàguó bìnggòu de jìnzhí diàochá xū hángài fǎlǜ héguī, cáiwù shěnjì jí wénhuà zhěnghé děng duō gè wéidù.
sentences.english: Due diligence for cross-border mergers and acquisitions must cover multiple dimensions including legal compliance, financial auditing, and cultural integration.

sentences.hanzi: 基于大数据分析的精准营销模式正在重塑传统行业的商业生态。
sentences.pinyin: jīyú dà shùjù fēnxī de jīngzhǔn yíngxiāo móshì zhèngzài chóngsù chuántǒng hángyè de shāngyè shēngtài.
sentences.english: Precision marketing models based on big data analysis are reshaping the commercial ecosystem of traditional industries.

sentences.hanzi: 企业社会责任报告的披露机制已成为衡量公司治理水平的重要指标之一。
sentences.pinyin: qǐyè shèhuì zérèn bàogào de pīlù jīzhì yǐ chéngwéi héngliáng gōngsī zhìlǐ shuǐpíng de zhòngyào zhǐbiāo zhī yī.
sentences.english: The disclosure mechanism of corporate social responsibility reports has become one of the important indicators for measuring the level of corporate governance.

sentences.hanzi: 在全球化与逆全球化思潮并存的时代，企业须在战略层面兼顾本土化运营与国际化布局的辩证统一。
sentences.pinyin: zài quánqiúhuà yǔ nì quánqiúhuà sīcháo bìngcún de shídài, qǐyè xū zài zhànlüè céngmiàn jiāngù běntǔhuà yùnyíng yǔ guójìhuà bùjú de biànzhèng tǒngyī.
sentences.english: In an era where globalization and anti-globalization sentiments coexist, enterprises must achieve a dialectical unity between localized operations and internationalized strategic positioning.

sentences.hanzi: 碳中和目标的提出促使各行业从根本上反思其商业模式，加速构建可持续的价值创造体系。
sentences.pinyin: tàn zhōnghé mùbiāo de tíchū cùshǐ gè hángyè cóng gēnběn shàng fǎnsī qí shāngyè móshì, jiāsù gòujiàn kě chíxù de jiàzhí chuàngzào tǐxì.
sentences.english: The proposal of carbon neutrality goals is prompting all industries to fundamentally reconsider their business models and accelerate the construction of sustainable value creation systems.
